titleStmt.title: SII 28.173: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 173. (A.R. No. 328 of 1913.)

summary.p: CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Naṭarāja temple, On the base of the Nandi-maṇḍapa opposite to the eastern gōpuram

There are twenty one fragmentary pieces of which eight have been pieced together to make some continuous sense. These pieced together seem to record that a group (vēṭkōvar ?) set up a deity, God Tirunīlakaṇṭīchuram[uḍaiyār] as the nāyanār of their caste and gifted some land for the worship of that God and maintenance (tiruppaṇi) of the temple. Probably the members of that group were enjoined to make a per capita contribution.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīmatkitikku mel komāṟapaṉmar tiribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiya ciṟakil Eṅkaḷ jādikku nāyaṉārāka nāṅkaḷ Eḻuntaruḷap paṇṇiṉa Uṭaiyār tirunilakaṇṭicuramu
tiruciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyilukku veṭkovaril kaṇat� ṭaiyārkkum parivārattu nāyaṉmārkkum pūjaikkum tiruppaṇikkum nāyakar tiruvitiye
maṭum ve kovarkku sāmutāyāñ ceyvārkaḷum kūṟuceyvārkaḷum nāyakañ ḻuntaruḷum potu tirukkāṭci sevikkavum Ittirunāṭkaḷil tirunilakaṇṭamuṭaiya nāya
tu nāṅkaḷ paṇṇiṉa vivasthaippaṭi Ivvūr Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā ṉār Eḻuntaruḷip pukuntu Amutu ceytaruḷavum puraṭṭāti tiruvātirait tirunāḷil māheśvarar
ṇṭa nilam Oṉpatu māvaraiyum Āka nilam Iraṇṭe mukkāle nālumāvaraikkāṇi muntiri
l kāriyañ ceyvār kaṇakkeḻutuvār viyāpāram paṇṇuvār taṉ paṇi ceyvārkaḷ muṉpu tiruni
kuṭukkavum Ippaṭi kuṭātārai maṇkalan takarttu veṇkalam Eṭuttuk koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum
ppaṭi cantirādittavaraiyum pūjaiyum tiruppaṇiyum celuttak kaṭavomāka sammatittuvivasthapa

The stones containing the inscription are very such disturbed. The above 8 lines have been put together from 8 pieces, four containing portions of the first four lines and the other four containing portions of the next four. The continuation of each of these 8 lines is not available. Apart from the above there are 13 more pieces reading as below:

mutuceytaruḷavum veṇṭuvaṉavai
1 nāṅkaḷ kuṭutta Eṅkaḷ kottu I
perkku per Oṉṟukku Āṭṭaikku
ta nellum Eṅkaḷ kottiṟpaṇi
paṭi nellukkum
kāṇṭu kuṭutta nilamā
coḻaṉ Uṭainilam
Oṅ kaṇṭattu vallam
ṟaccālaiyil kalamme
yūr kiḻavaṉ tirukkaḻippā
pakkal vilaikoṇṭa ni
ṭṭār pakkal vilai �
ṭalāka tevatāṉam
Eṅkaḷ kottukku ji
mā mukkāṇi muntirikai
ṭayāṉ pakkal vilai ko
rakkālu
ṭattu na
ṉārkku
Imai I
ṅkaḷukku varum jivitat
ṭiye kāriyañ ceyvār
mutalākki pūcaiyum tiru
vai koyil mutaṟ taṇa
tti paṇi Oṉṟukkum Ilakkaittā
�ṉ tirucciṟṟampalaveḷāṉ vilaite
nilam Iraṇṭu māvum Irājentira
m kāle Araikkāṇiyum Iraṇ
tta Etirili coḻaṉ A
la mutaṟ kaṇakkup puli
ṭam vallamuṭaiyāṉ
Oḷiniṉṟāṉ Uḷa�
kaṭamaiyum paṇikkottum tevaikaḷum Ep
kaṇakkeḻutuvār viyāpāram paṇṇuvār �
p paṇiyum ceyyumiṭattu Ikkoyil muṉpu El
kkut tiruvetirampalaveḷāṉum tillai Ampala
m kuṭuttamaiyil I
�yaṉārkkuk kuṭuttu
Ippaṭiyuḷḷa mutal
vvaṉaivom Ippa
ttu vallamuṭaiyā
ṇṭiyuṭaiyāṉ �
raiye Araikkāṇi
tuk kuṭutta nilam 8
pakkal koṇṭa nilattuk
ṟāṉ nañcuṇṭāṉ pakkal vi
ḻailattuṭaiyāṉ viraṉ
ṟumākkāṇi muntirakaikkiḻ
yaṟṟukku
lakkaitta
kkalamā
yil kuṭu
Digital edition of SII 28.173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
